ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pensions" (
  "pension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension record */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the pension record belongs to */,
  "pension_amount" REAL /* Pension amount received by the retiree */,
  "pension_year" TEXT /* Year the pension amount was calculated or paid */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of pension payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of pension payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the benefit record belongs to */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount of benefits received by the retiree */,
  "benefit_year" TEXT /* Year the benefit amount was calculated or paid */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, vision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disabilities" (
  "disability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability payment record */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the disability payment record belongs to */,
  "disability_amount" REAL /* Amount of disability payments received by the retiree */,
  "disability_year" TEXT /* Year the disability payment amount was calculated or paid */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Type of disability (e.g., physical, mental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total compensation record */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the total compensation record belongs to */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of compensation received by the retiree (pension + benefits + disability) */,
  "compensation_year" TEXT /* Year the total compensation amount was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the employer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the employer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pension plan */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the pension plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, HR, finance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the retiree record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the retiree record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the change record belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., pension, benefits, disability) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retirement_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the retirement plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the retirement plan */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the retirement plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual review */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the review belongs to */,
  "review_year" TEXT /* Year of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who conducted the review */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retiree_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, benefits statement) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created or received */,
  "document_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retiree_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "retiree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retiree the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)
